title: waltheria lophanthus
intro: Waltheria lophanthus, also known as the African Waltheria or Waltheria plant, is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
